title: Administrative Burdens Advisory Board 'Tell ABAB' report 2024 to 2025
body: "The Administrative Burdens Advisory Board, which comprises of 11 representatives from a diverse range of businesses and professions, aims to ensure that HMRC better understands the needs of small businesses when engaging with the tax system.  The ‘Tell ABAB’ report is a summary of responses to ABAB’s annual online survey, one of the most important tools it uses to help HMRC understand the experiences of small businesses.  "
